title: Onboarding Clients
content_md:
# Onboarding Clients

- Code: 78415ef9
- Source: https://www.skool.com/ai-seo-mastery-pro/classroom/63a81f62?md=78415ef904854fb396daf569e4733dd1
- Video: https://www.loom.com/share/2b3c78f3189c468ca0e760931ab8ba72?hide_owner=true&hide_share=true&hide_title=true&hideEmbedTopBar=true
- Duration: 1m 19s
- Resources:
  - [Onboarding Excel Sheet](None)

## Description

_(no description)_

transcript.text: So, this is the onboarding sheet that I used for my internal team.
This is, we would land a new client who doesn't have a website, doesn't have a Google Business
profile, and these are step-by-step directions on exactly what to do and how to do it.
Every single step is called out here, what it is, what we're going to do, and then we
have a link to a video where you can see me actually doing it.
And we go through all of these different steps, and then of course we have other tabs
for connecting the GVP into high level, and then we have the internal links tracker here.
So, if this is a resource that's helpful to you, feel free to use it, feel free to use these videos.
If it's not, feel free to not.
This is a valuable onboarding guide that we put together for the specific use case.
So, even if you aren't building new websites on high level for everyone, just taking a look at
how I structured this, this allowed us to essentially get to the point where we were
bringing in clients nearly every day, and I had almost no involvement with any of the onboarding
or discussions. It was a step-by-step, here's how you do it, here's what to take care of.
This file is available for download below this lesson.

summary: This lesson covers a detailed onboarding sheet for new clients who lack websites and Google Business profiles. It includes step-by-step instructions with linked videos to ensure smooth client integration.
